---
pagetitle: "Echtzeit-Objekterkennung · Visual Computing"
description-meta: "Browser-basierte Echtzeit-Objekterkennung mit TensorFlow.js. Visual-Computing-Projekt, Hochschule München."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
          <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
          <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter+Tight:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    include-after-body:
      - text: |
          <script src="app.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<header class="site-header">
  <div class="brand">
    <span class="brand-mark">HM·</span>
    <span class="brand-meta">Visual Computing · Objekterkennung</span>
  </div>
  <div class="status-bar">
    <span class="status-dot" id="model-status-dot"></span>
    <span id="model-status-text">Modell wird geladen …</span>
  </div>
</header>

<main class="page-main">
  <div class="stage">
    <div class="stage-frame">
      <video id="video" playsinline muted loop crossorigin="anonymous"></video>
      <canvas id="overlay"></canvas>

      <div class="dropzone" id="dropzone">
        <div class="drop-inner">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" class="drop-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <rect x="6" y="14" width="42" height="30" rx="2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"/>
            <path d="M48 24 L58 18 L58 40 L48 34 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"/>
            <circle cx="18" cy="24" r="3" fill="currentColor"/>
          </svg>
          <p class="drop-title">Video hier ablegen</p>
          <label class="btn-upload">
            <input type="file" id="file-input" accept="video/*" hidden />
            Datei auswählen
          </label>
          <p class="drop-hint">mp4 · webm · mov · läuft lokal im Browser</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hud" id="hud" hidden>
        <span class="hud-label">FPS</span>
        <span id="hud-fps">--</span>
      </div>

      <div class="loader" id="loader" hidden>
        <div class="loader-ring"></div>
        <p id="loader-text">Modell wird geladen …</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="controls" id="controls" hidden>
      <button class="ctrl-btn" id="play-btn" aria-label="Play/Pause">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" id="play-icon" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" id="pause-icon" hidden aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 5h4v14H6zM14 5h4v14h-4z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
      </button>
      <input type="range" id="seek" min="0" max="100" value="0" step="0.1" />
      <span class="time" id="time">00:00 / 00:00</span>
      <button class="ctrl-btn" id="reset-btn" aria-label="Neues Video">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5V1L7 6l5 5V7c3.31 0 6 2.69 6 6s-2.69 6-6 6-6-2.69-6-6H4c0 4.42 3.58 8 8 8s8-3.58 8-8-3.58-8-8-8z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</main>
```
